title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Amenorrhea
description: Astragalus membranaceus tinctures contain compounds like astragalosides, flavonoids, and saponins that may help alleviate amenorrhea symptoms. These constituents are believed to modulate the hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal axis, which regulates menstrual cycles. The saponins, in particular, have been shown to stimulate the release of luteinizing hormone (LH), a hormone that helps trigger ovulation and menstruation.
